themes: Anthropic compute scale-up (5GW AWS deal continuation)
model competition (Kimi K2.6 vs Claude, Codex reliability)

worthClicking.author: @aakashgupta
worthClicking.why: Concrete framing of Claude Cowork killing Tableau/Looker/Retool pricing — 575K views signals this is reshaping how buyers think about BI spend.

worthClicking.author: @aakashgupta
worthClicking.why: Scoreboard of Anthropic's compute locked up since OpenAI's 'strategic misstep' jab — useful for competitive positioning conversations.

worthClicking.author: @levie
worthClicking.why: Aaron Levie's point that chatbot-to-agent automation requires dedicated internal owners is the cleanest framing of the enterprise AI adoption gap right now.

worthClicking.author: @emollick
worthClicking.why: Academic paper rerunning the classic Angrist economist-diversity study with agentic AI shows Claude Code and Codex land near human median with far tighter variance — hard evidence for AI-as-scalable-research-workforce.

worthClicking.author: @DataChaz
worthClicking.why: Boris Cherny (Claude Code creator) reveals his actual daily workflow including running 5-10 parallel agents — rare primary source on how the tool is meant to be used.

worthClicking.author: @RoundtableSpace
worthClicking.why: 20-year-old sells $3-in-parts tracking prototype for $230K the next day using Claude Code — the distribution story here is about speed-to-market compressing to one night.

worthClicking.author: @aakashgupta
worthClicking.why: Best single-post breakdown of why Tim Cook's exit and Ternus's promotion is really an Apple AI crisis story, not a routine succession — 584K views.

worthClicking.author: @aakashgupta
worthClicking.why: Lovable's $6.6B valuation alongside a live demo of reading another user's credentials in 5 API calls is a sharp cautionary data point for anyone selling into vibe-coded stacks.

worthClicking.author: @emollick
worthClicking.why: Mollick's direct call that Kimi 2.6 over-indexes on benchmarks vs. real use — useful ground truth when clients ask whether to swap Claude for cheaper open-weights alternatives.

voices.why: Consistently breaking down product and compute strategy with specific numbers and real stakes — several posts this run exceeded 100K views on topics directly relevant to AI product and sales positioning.
Provides grounded, empirically-tested takes on model quality and AI-at-work that cut through benchmark hype — rare in this feed.
Enterprise AI adoption framing from a practitioner CEO perspective, not punditry.
Tracks Claude Code internals and tooling closely, sourced Boris Cherny workflow interview before it spread.

examples: newsletter self-promotion (multiple @aakashgupta 'subscribe to my newsletter' posts)
lifestyle/travel posts with no signal (sparkling water, airport check-ins, light mode debates)
crypto/Polymarket content unrelated to operator interests
